2606.31519.title: RaBitQCache: Rotated Binary Quantization for KVCache in Long Context LLM Inference
2606.31519.paper_summary: Long-context Large Language Model inference is severely bottlenecked by the massive Key-Value (KV) cache, yet existing sparse attention methods often suffer from static fixed-budget (Top-k) retrieval or rely on proxy scores that are computationally expensive and biased. To address these limitations, we propose RaBitQCache, a novel sparse attention framework that utilizes randomized rotated binary quantization and high-throughput binary-INT4 arithmetic to efficiently estimate attention weights. Our proxy score serves as an unbiased estimator with a proven error bound, enabling adaptive Top-p retrieval that dynamically adjusts the token budget based on actual attention sparsity. We further implement a hardware-aware system with asynchronous pipelining and lazy updates to mask overhead. Evaluations demonstrate that RaBitQCache significantly accelerates inference and reduces memory I/O while preserving generation quality compared to state-of-the-art baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/Sakuraaa0/RaBitQCache.git.
2606.31519.paper_summary_zh: 長文上下文的大型語言模型推理受到龐大的鍵值 (KV) 快取的嚴重瓶頸，而現有的稀疏注意力方法往往面臨靜態固定預算 (Top-k) 檢索的問題，或依賴於計算成本高且有偏見的代理分數。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了 RaBitQCache，一個新穎的稀疏注意力框架，利用隨機旋轉的二進位量化和高通量的二進位-INT4 算術來有效估算注意力權重。我們的代理分數作為無偏估計量，具備經過驗證的誤差界限，使得自適應的 Top-p 檢索能夠根據實際的注意力稀疏性動態調整標記預算。我們進一步實現了一個硬體感知系統，具備非同步管線和懶更新以掩蓋開銷。評估結果顯示，RaBitQCache 顯著加速了推理並減少了記憶體 I/O，同時在生成質量上相比於最先進的基準保持不變。代碼可在 https://github.com/Sakuraaa0/RaBitQCache.git 獲得。
2606.31519.author: Wenhao Li et.al.
2606.31519.authors: Wenhao Li, Jinhao Dong, Hailin Zhang, Wenhang Shi, Wei Lu, Xiaoyong Du
